      have h₃ : ([] : List Int) ∈ (nums.foldl (fun acc x => acc ++ acc.map (fun sub => x :: sub)) [ [] ] |>.map List.reverse) := by

        have h₄ : ∀ (l : List Int), ([] : List Int) ∈ (l.foldl (fun acc x => acc ++ acc.map (fun sub => x :: sub)) [ [] ] |>.map List.reverse) := by

          -- Since the empty list is in the original list and is increasing, it is in the filter
          simp_all [List.mem_filter]
        have h₁₁ : (List.length ([] : List Int)) ∈ ( ( (nums.foldl (fun acc x => acc ++ acc.map (fun sub => x :: sub)) [ [] ]) |>.map List.reverse ).filter (fun l => List.Pairwise (· < ·) l) |>.map (·.length) ) := by

              <;> simp_all
